[Run CRT tests/build]   |         but it is absent from setuptools' `packages` configuration.
[Run CRT tests/build]   | 
[Run CRT tests/build]   |         This leads to an ambiguous overall configuration. If you want to distribute this
[Run CRT tests/build]   |         package, please make sure that 'botocore.data' is explicitly added
[Run CRT tests/build]   |         to the `packages` configuration field.
[Run CRT tests/build]   | 
[Run CRT tests/build]   |         Alternatively, you can also rely on setuptools' discovery methods
[Run CRT tests/build]   |         (for example by using `find_namespace_packages(...)`/`find_namespace:`
[Run CRT tests/build]   |         instead of `find_packages(...)`/`find:`).
[Run CRT tests/build]   |

[Run CRT tests/build]   |         already explicitly excluding 'botocore.data' via
[Run CRT tests/build]   |         `find_namespace_packages(...)/find_namespace` or `find_packages(...)/find`,
[Run CRT tests/build]   |         you can try to use `exclude_package_data`, or `include-package-data=False` in
[Run CRT tests/build]   |         combination with a more fine grained `package-data` configuration.
